finding: On benign-context labels (mitigated vs unmitigated, same vuln type), the recall-safe lever lifts precision with ZERO recall loss: rule-based +22.5pp, LLM +48.2pp (~2.3x). LLM caught the semantic mitigations (SafeMath, CEI, block-var bookkeeping) the keyword rules miss.
caveats: Curated/minimal contracts isolate the mitigated-vs-real distinction; wild-corpus benign-context set is the next scale-up.
LLM verifier recall-safe prompt (default not-FP under uncertainty); 32b ~15-45s/finding.
